MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-04-2007 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery For Deemed Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-05-2007 Off Calendar

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DAVINDER MANN'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCE: Carolyn Morris, Esq. 510/841-1440 specially for Anne M. Schauerman, Esq. 626/965-9465 for pltf & opposing party; Peter N. Hadiaris, Esq. 593-0077 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT (and default judgment) AND FILE RESPONSE. The Court sustained defendant's objection to plaintiff's late filed declaration of Robert Fair. Order signed in open court. (302/REQ/KD) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Carolyn Morris, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a national banking assoc.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the filed written declarations, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Davinder Mann aka Davinder S. Mann, aka Davinder Singh Mann, ind & dba East West Video as follows:
Damages $38,788.93
Prejudgment Interest $7,039.39
Attorney's Fees $1,274.00
Costs $415.63, for a total of $47,517.95
Judgment signed in open court.
